title: Set up React Hook Form with Zod validation in Next.js
summary: Full React Hook Form v7 integration — installation, Zod schema validation, shadcn/ui Form components, and Server Action submission pattern.
declaration: I will integrate React Hook Form v7 with Zod validation into this project. This is the standard pattern for client-side forms in Next.js App Router — performant, type-safe, and compatible with shadcn/ui Form components. If you are using Server Actions as the form handler (instead of API routes), tell me and I will show both patterns.
